CE1.justification: Acted directly from preamble + message; no questions, no requests for context.

CE2.justification: Compact overall but appends a closing meta-clause ('Not acting further unless you want me to') and lists four candidate next steps where one or two would carry the same signal.

CE3.justification: Says destination and why in-band ('Logged the recurring contractor-access pattern ... to observations.md, and opened a followup in followups.md with concrete next steps') — pattern vs. action surface distinction is on the page.

CE4.justification: All artifacts written cleanly with EOD handoff in the daybook pointing the next session at the followup; partial state would be coherent.
